text: The commissioner may develop a public education campaign to deter participation in auto insurance fraud and to encourage reporting of fraudulent claims.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 4. SPECIAL ANTITHEFT LAWS [10500 - 10904]
### Chapter 5. Motor Vehicle Theft Prevention [10900 - 10904]
##### § 10904

The commissioner may develop a public education campaign to deter participation in auto insurance fraud and to encourage reporting of fraudulent claims.

*(Added by Stats. 2000, Ch. 867, Sec. 22. Effective January 1, 2001.)*
